works in conjuction with list commands function on whatsapp dialogue if doc.is_reply == 1 and doc.get('type') == 'Incoming': whatsapp_contact = get_whatsapp_contact(doc.get('from')) replied_to_message = frappe.get_list( doctype='WhatsApp Message', fields=['*'], filters={'message_id': doc.reply_to_message_id}, ignore_permissions=True ) #
